targets.queryText: SELECT goal_progress_pct/100.0 AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT goal_progress_pct/100.0 AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1

targets.queryText: SELECT goal_net_progress_pct/100.0 AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT goal_net_progress_pct/100.0 AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1

targets.queryText: SELECT goal_months_to_goal AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT goal_months_to_goal AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1

targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(goal_likely_tier AS TEXT) || ' - ' || COALESCE(goal_likely_tier_name,'n/a') AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(goal_likely_tier AS TEXT) || ' - ' || COALESCE(goal_likely_tier_name,'n/a') AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1

targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(UPPER(goal_pace_category),'N/A') AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(UPPER(goal_pace_category),'N/A') AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1

targets.queryText: SELECT goal_pace_months_ahead_behind AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT goal_pace_months_ahead_behind AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1

targets.queryText: SELECT tier, name, target_monthly, required_portfolio_value, months_to_goal, estimated_goal_date FROM daily_goal_tiers WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_goal_tiers) ORDER BY tier LIMIT 8
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tier, name, target_monthly, required_portfolio_value, months_to_goal, estimated_goal_date FROM daily_goal_tiers WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_goal_tiers) ORDER BY tier LIMIT 8

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT goal_pace_windows_json FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 8), windows AS (SELECT value AS w FROM latest, json_each(latest.goal_pace_windows_json)) SELECT json_extract(w,'$.window_name') AS window_name, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.days_in_window') AS INTEGER) AS days, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.expected.portfolio_value') AS REAL) AS expected_pv, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.actual.portfolio_value') AS REAL) AS actual_pv, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.pace.months_ahead_behind') AS REAL) AS months_ahead_behind FROM windows ORDER BY days LIMIT 8
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT goal_pace_windows_json FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 8), windows AS (SELECT value AS w FROM latest, json_each(latest.goal_pace_windows_json)) SELECT json_extract(w,'$.window_name') AS window_name, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.days_in_window') AS INTEGER) AS days, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.expected.portfolio_value') AS REAL) AS expected_pv, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.actual.portfolio_value') AS REAL) AS actual_pv, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.pace.months_ahead_behind') AS REAL) AS months_ahead_behind FROM windows ORDER BY days LIMIT 8

title: D07 LMI v2 - Goals & Tier Scenarios
